ham.subject: Your Order Confirmation – Thank You for Shopping with Amazon
ham.body:
Hello Jane Doe,

Thank you for your recent purchase from Amazon. We are pleased to confirm that your order has been successfully placed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
  • Order ID: 08A12-9876543-3210987
  • Items Purchased:
      – “Echo Dot (3rd Gen)” – $49.99
      – “Fire TV Stick” – $39.99
      – “USB-C Charger” – $15.99
  • Total Amount: $105.97 (including tax and shipping)

Shipping Information:
  • Shipping Method: Standard Delivery
  • Expected Delivery Window: 3–5 business days
  • Tracking Number: 123456789012

If you have any questions about your order, feel free to reply to this email or visit your Amazon account for more details.

Thank you for shopping with us!

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Action Required: Payroll Update – Immediate Attention Needed
spam.body:
Dear John Smith,

The Payroll Department has identified a discrepancy in the recent salary disbursement for your account. To ensure that your future payments are processed without delay, we require you to verify your bank account details within the next 48 hours.

Please follow the instructions below:
  1. Log in to the Secure HR Portal.
  2. Navigate to the ‘Payroll Settings’ section.
  3. Confirm or update your bank details.
  4. Submit the changes and await confirmation.

If you do not complete this verification, your upcoming salary may be delayed. For any assistance, reply to this email or call the HR helpdesk at 1-800-555-0199.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
HR Payroll Team
